response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of solid software engineering experience but the resume shows minimal recent C++ work — only a brief stint at National Instruments (2014-2015) and a bachelor thesis project. The role centers on C++ architecture, STL, multi-threading, message brokers, and industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443), none of which appear in recent experience. Primary stack is JS/TypeScript/DLang/Node.js with no evidence of IoT protocols, MQTT, or SDL practices.
strengths: Long track record (15+ years) across web, mobile, desktop, embedded
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, testable design
Some C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on a developer tooling product
concerns: C++ experience is ~6 months from 2014-2015; no recent hands-on C++ work
No evidence of IEC 62443, SDL, industrial cybersecurity, or MQTT/Modbus/OPC UA
No message-broker / large-scale concurrent C++ systems experience shown

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering seniority and craftsmanship
